title: Stage Chain
description: Exploit chain analysis output. Identifies multi-step attack chains from confirmed findings and assigns escalated severity.

chains.description: Multi-step exploit chains identified across all confirmed findings

title.description: Short chain title, e.g. 'Info leak + IDOR = Account Takeover'

severity.description: Escalated severity for the combined chain (may exceed individual step severities)

blocked_by.description: Production controls that would block this chain (empty if realistically exploitable)

narrative.description: One-paragraph explanation of how the chain works end-to-end

summary.description: Overall chain analysis summary: how many chains found, highest severity, any blocking controls

tokens_input.description: Input tokens consumed by chain analysis

tokens_output.description: Output tokens consumed by chain analysis
